meta.summary: antiSMASH 8.0.4 standalone runtime for bacterial and fungal secondary metabolite biosynthetic gene cluster prediction.
meta.description: antiSMASH 8.0.4 standalone runtime for bacterial and fungal secondary metabolite biosynthetic gene cluster prediction.

test: python3 -c 'import antismash; print(antismash.__version__)' | grep -Fx '8.0.4' >/dev/null && antismash --version 2>&1 | grep -F '8.0.4' >/dev/null
antismash --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: antismash' >/dev/null && antismash --help-showall 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--minimal' >/dev/null && antismash --help-showall 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--taxon' >/dev/null

test -d /local/databases && find -L /local/databases -mindepth 1 -print | head -n 1 | grep -q . && python3 -c 'import antismash; antismash.config.build_config(["--databases", "/local/databases"], modules=antismash.get_all_modules()); antismash.main.prepare_module_data()'

diamond version 2>&1 | grep -F 'diamond' >/dev/null && hmmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && hmmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && prodigal -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Prodigal' >/dev/null && blastp -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastp' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-antismash-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python3 -c 'print(">tiny\n" + "ATG" + "GCT" * 998 + "TAA")' > "$tmp/tiny.fa"; antismash --taxon bacteria --genefinding-tool prodigal --minimal --output-dir "$tmp/out" "$tmp/tiny.fa" >/tmp/taf-antismash-smoke.log 2>&1; find "$tmp/out" -type f -name "*.json" | grep -q .; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: antiSMASH
upstream.license: AGPL-3.0-or-later; bundled databases, third-party tools, and data resources retain their own upstream terms
